BEAST SCORE 2.0
Advanced body composition analysis — BMI, BMR, TDEE, body fat %, lean mass, muscle mass estimate, and a personalised 0–100 Beast Score with elite classification.
FREE
🥗
SMART MEAL PLANNER
7-day personalised meal plans auto-built from your Beast Score using proven nutrition formulas. Vegetarian, Non-Veg, Eggetarian, Keto. Indian recipes, macro-split, 200+ foods.
⚡ PRO
👑
1-ON-1 COACHING
Personal coaching from India's top fitness experts. Custom workout programs, weekly check-ins, diet adjustments, and dedicated WhatsApp support.
👑 ELITE
📚
PDF GUIDE LIBRARY
108+ professional guides across Beginner, Advanced, and Master levels. Anabolic science, nutrition, SARMs, body recomposition, mindset, and more.
⚡ PRO
🩺
MEDICAL DIET PROTOCOLS
17 health conditions supported — Diabetes, PCOS, Thyroid, Hypertension, Fatty Liver, IBS, Anaemia, Gout, and more. Personalised supplement stacks and clinical diet notes.
FREE
📊
PROGRESS TRACKER
Before/after progress photos, body measurement logs, weight chart, daily streak tracker, hydration counter, and workout session logger — all in one place.
⚡ PRO
🏆
BEAST LEADERBOARD
Live community leaderboard ranked by Beast Score. See where you stand among all members, earn achievement badges, and rise through the elite classifications.
FREE
🫀
BLOOD REPORT ANALYSER
Enter your blood panel values and get instant formula-based interpretation — CBC, lipid profile, HbA1c, thyroid, vitamins, hormones. Generates a personalised health score with recommendations.

🔥 Dynamic Warm-Up Builder

Select your workout type to get a tailored 5-minute warm-up routine.

Upper Body
Lower Body
Full Body
Cardio/Run
🫀 Foam Rolling Protocol

Roll each area for 30–60 sec. Pause on tight spots. Breathe through it.

🦵
Quads / IT Band
Lie face down. Roll from hip to knee. Pause on knots 10–20 sec. Rotate leg in/out.
⏱ 60 sec each side
🍑
Glutes / Piriformis
Sit on roller with one ankle over opposite knee. Lean into glute. Small circles.
⏱ 45 sec each side
🔙
Upper Back (Thoracic)
Roller across mid-back. Arms crossed or hands behind head. Extend back over roller.
⏱ 60 sec total
🦶
Calves
Sit with roller under calf. Lift hips. Roll from ankle to knee. Flex/point foot.
⏱ 45 sec each side
💪
Lats / Thoracic
Side-lying with arm extended overhead. Roll from armpit down to mid-back.
⏱ 45 sec each side
🦴
Hip Flexors
Face down, roller at front of hip. Rock slowly side to side. Lift knee to intensify.
⏱ 45 sec each side
Pro tip: Roll before training to warm up and increase range. Roll after training for recovery. Never roll directly on a joint or the lower spine.

Android App
Royal Fitness Club for Android
⬇ Download APK (~20MB)
How to Install
1
Tap ⬇ Download APK above — the file downloads to your Android phone.
2
Go to Settings → Security (or Install Unknown Apps) and enable installation from your browser.
3
Open your Downloads folder, tap royal-fitness-club.apk and tap Install.
4
Launch Royal Fitness Club from your home screen — all your data syncs automatically.
Requirements: Android 7.0+ · ~20MB · All features included
Note: This is a side-loaded APK. You may see a "Play Protect" warning — tap Install anyway.

About you
Used to calculate your exact calorie target and macro split.
Your body stats
Needed to calculate your BMR, BMI, and personalised calorie target.
How active are you?
This determines your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE).
🪑 Sedentary
Desk job, little or no exercise
🚶 Lightly Active
Light exercise 1–3 days/week
🏃 Moderately Active
Gym 3–5 days/week
🔥 Very Active
Hard training 6–7 days/week
⚡ Beast Mode
Twice a day or physical job
Any health conditions?
Optional — your meal plan and supplements will auto-adjust. Tap all that apply.
🩺 Diabetes

🫀 Fatty Liver
